subcodes.first_line: O spiritual friend! Through Jináb-i-Mírzá Ahmad Sohrab thy letter was received, and from its contents [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار روحانی بواسطه جناب آقا میرزا احمد سهراب نامه شما رسید و از مضمون
subcodes.subjects: @agriculture, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @non-participation in politics, @promotion of commerce and industry, @excellence; distinction, @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness
